{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314213468A877C74F86021304A9"}"},"total":2121},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7479680482058896152","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看的一本末世文，没有圣母心泛滥，也不是片甲不留，从头到尾都坚持了自己的底线，有原则的人才不会在末世里迷失，也没有因为自己的特殊而自诩不凡，不仅拥有一个相爱不疑还体贴的爱人，一个武力值top且搭配合理的小队，还拥有一群信任自己的伙伴，最后亲手报了仇，一切都在像好的方向发展，大抵是一个原本的小人物能在末世活出的最好的样子。
爱一朵花，就让他在安全的地方绽放。
在末世，就去做一些自己能做到的事情吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741501514,"group_id":"7357191357133229081","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5QOHm2DFiD33daaS7JgRwQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"109272559973","user_name":"萧久暝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109272559973","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7357191357133229081","book_info":{"abstract":"双男主，1v1，双洁，甜宠爽文。
上辈子末世，姜年被囚禁在地下室，丧尸潮来临时被家人抛弃，最后惨死在赶来救援的前任哥程境怀里。
再次睁眼，姜年重生回到末世前半个月，为了苟命当即决定厚脸皮吃回头草。
首先，跟前任哥借点钱囤物资：
姜年：“程境，你能不能借我点钱？”
程境：“点名道姓的跟我借钱，你怎么不让我跪下！”
姜年：“境哥我错了……”
再次上位成功后，他安心抱紧前任兼现任哥大腿开始末世躺平生活。
PS：
看文带入角度不同观感就不一样，尊重他人看法尊重作者设定，不要过度带入现实三观去共情。
喜欢就看，不喜欢就弃，自己的标准自己用，不要恶言相向。
作者写文不易，请高抬贵手别恶意差评，谢谢。
祝大家都能看到自己喜欢的小说。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5c949aa46611318fb35ea297f4cfd655","author":"卿非","author_id":"","book_id":"7357191357133229081","book_name":"末世重生，我靠吃软饭躺平","book_short_name":"净化重启","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7357195238622167577","read_count":"42128","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"569780"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"272","tags":"双男主,现代,重生,空间,末世,甜宠,囤物资,双洁,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/898345bf082de5f5ccbc81957da5003d~tplv-noo p.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430895&x-signature=LnmcK2lpAJqk2gmte285VilgOKA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100378843424","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"63"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314213468A877C74F86021304A9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":101,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12058,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":114129},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1714736629,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7378147132938044184","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"就所有的东西结合来看我打满分"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717860075,"group_id":"7357191357133229081","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"82315093088"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7357191357133229081","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"89"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16711,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21928,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7378140557285671704","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从整体的故事向和环节来看，我目前感官还可以，全是很不错的一本末世文。几个重要角色的人物塑造也在线，主角之间的感情线也很好看。总体来说可以支持并且追更，只要不烂尾，大部分喜欢这种题材的应该都可以看下去。
不过就我已经看了那么多年书的经验来看，作者在一些更加深度的细节刻画做得还不够完美，对于人形的思考和生死的相对矛盾处理个人感觉还不够完美【没有杠的意思，只是连续看下来，然后一些地方记得比较清楚，我感觉有的地方会有一点小小的矛盾吧。】不过这也正常，大概也是个人三观的不同，个人来看有些地方读起来会心里不舒服。如果作者的本意就是这样，那就证明作者太太功底不错。
总体来说还是很值得一看，不过具体感官在于个人，我是比较喜欢的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717859653,"group_id":"7357191357133229081","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嘻嘻，我沉醉于幻想，感受棱镜下的虚妄（中二发言中）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4UEipUH74FZstnxtFFmezU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f225c5421ad34dbea96d701a5724e8cf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792990&x-signature=vKoN0C5OUelyUStvo3THVk1nMGk%3D","user_id":"82315093088","user_name":"Ha乐子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"82315093088","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7357191357133229081","book_info":{"abstract":"双男主，1v1，双洁，甜宠爽文。
